experience.title: Bookkeeper/Accountant
bullets: Full-cycle QB: AR/invoicing, deposits & bank downloads, cash/bank recs, monthly/annual FS, tax return inputs

skills_and_achievements: CPA (FL); QuickBooks; Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook, Publisher); tax software. Designed GL interfaces and controls; standardized COA/reporting for church association; led bank-rec project across 72 branches—cleared $1–3M suspense to <$2K write-off; strong documentation/training.
